001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
028
029/**
030 * Serializes POJO models to INI format.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Converts Java POJOs to INI format (section/key-value structure).
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
036 * <p>
037 * Produces: <bc>text/ini</bc>
038 * <br>Accepts: <bc>text/ini, text/x-ini</bc>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='topic'>Bean-to-INI mapping</h5>
041 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
042 *    <li>Simple properties → key-value pairs in the default section
043 *    <li>Nested beans → <c>[sectionName]</c> sections
044 *    <li>Deeply nested beans → <c>[path/to/section]</c> section paths
045 *    <li>Collections and complex values → JSON5-encoded inline values
046 *    <li>Maps with string keys → <c>[sectionName]</c> sections
047 *    <li>Null values → unquoted <c>null</c> token
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
051 * <p class='bjava'>
052 *    <jc>// Serialize a bean to INI</jc>
053 *    String <jv>ini</jv> = IniSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>myBean</jv>);
054 *
055 *    <jc>// Create a custom serializer</jc>
056 *    IniSerializer <jv>s</jv> = IniSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().useComments().build();
057 *    <jv>ini</jv> = <jv>s</jv>.serialize(<jv>myBean</jv>);
058 * </p>
059 *
060 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (Map of name/age):</h5>
061 * <p class='bini'>
062 *    <ck>name</ck> = <cv>Alice</cv>
063 *    <ck>age</ck> = <cv>30</cv>
064 * </p>
065 *
066 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
067 * <p class='bini'>
068 *    <ck>name</ck> = <cv>Alice</cv>
069 *    <ck>age</ck> = <cv>30</cv>
070 *    <ck>tags</ck> = <cv>['a','b','c']</cv>
071 *
072 *    <cs>[address]</cs>
073 *    <ck>street</ck> = <cv>123 Main St</cv>
074 *    <ck>city</ck> = <cv>Boston</cv>
075 *    <ck>state</ck> = <cv>MA</cv>
076 * </p>
077 *
078 * <h5 class='topic'>Limitations</h5>
079 * <p>
080 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
081 *    <li>Top-level collections, arrays, and scalar values are not supported. The root must be a bean or
082 *       <c>Map&lt;String,?&gt;</c>. Throws {@link SerializeException} for unsupported root types.
083 *    <li>{@link Reader} and {@link InputStream} passthrough is not supported.
084 * </ul>
085 *
086 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
087 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
088 *    <li class='note'>Complex values (collections, maps with complex values) are embedded as JSON5 inline
089 *       strings and remain fully round-trippable.
090 * </ul>
091 *
092 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
093 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/IniBasics">INI Basics</a>
094 * </ul>
095 */
096@SuppressWarnings({
097   "java:S110", "java:S115",
098   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
099})
100public class IniSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements IniMetaProvider, RecordWritable {
101
102   private final java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<ClassMeta<?>, IniClassMeta> iniClassMetas = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
103   private final java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<BeanPropertyMeta, IniBeanPropertyMeta> iniBeanPropertyMetas = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
104
105   private static final String PROP_kvSeparator = "kvSeparator";
106   private static final String PROP_spacedSeparator = "spacedSeparator";
107   private static final String PROP_useComments = "useComments";
108   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
109
110   /**
111    * Builder class.
112    */
113   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
114
115      private static final Cache<HashKey,IniSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, IniSerializer.class).build();
116
117      private char kvSeparator = '=';
118      private boolean spacedSeparator = true;
119      private boolean useComments = false;
120
121      protected Builder() {
122         produces("text/ini");
123         accept("text/ini,text/x-ini");
124      }
125
126      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
127         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
128         kvSeparator = copyFrom.kvSeparator;
129         spacedSeparator = copyFrom.spacedSeparator;
130         useComments = copyFrom.useComments;
131      }
132
133      protected Builder(IniSerializer copyFrom) {
134         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
135         kvSeparator = copyFrom.kvSeparator;
136         spacedSeparator = copyFrom.spacedSeparator;
137         useComments = copyFrom.useComments;
138      }
139
140      /**
141       * Key-value separator character.
142       *
143       * @param value <c>=</c> (default) or <c>:</c>.
144       * @return This object.
145       */
146      public Builder kvSeparator(char value) {
147         kvSeparator = value;
148         return this;
149      }
150
151      /**
152       * Whether to add spaces around the separator.
153       *
154       * @param value <jk>true</jk> for <c>key = value</c>, <jk>false</jk> for <c>key=value</c>.
155       * @return This object.
156       */
157      public Builder spacedSeparator(boolean value) {
158         spacedSeparator = value;
159         return this;
160      }
161
162      /**
163       * Whether to emit <c>#</c> comments from bean property descriptions.
164       *
165       * @param value The flag.
166       * @return This object.
167       */
168      public Builder useComments(boolean value) {
169         useComments = value;
170         return this;
171      }
172
173      /**
174       * Emit <c>#</c> comments from bean property descriptions.
175       *
176       * @return This object.
177       */
178      public Builder useComments() {
179         useComments = true;
180         return this;
181      }
182
183      @Override
184      public Builder useWhitespace() {
185         super.useWhitespace();
186         return this;
187      }
188
189      @Override
190      public Builder useWhitespace(boolean value) {
191         super.useWhitespace(value);
192         return this;
193      }
194
195      @Override
196      public Builder ws() {
197         return useWhitespace();
198      }
199
200      @Override
201      public IniSerializer build() {
202         return cache(CACHE).build(IniSerializer.class);
203      }
204
205      @Override
206      public Builder copy() {
207         return new Builder(this);
208      }
209
210      @Override
211      public HashKey hashKey() {
212         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), kvSeparator, spacedSeparator, useComments);
213      }
214   }
215
216   /** Default serializer. */
217   public static final IniSerializer DEFAULT = new IniSerializer(create());
218
219   /** Default serializer with blank lines between sections. */
220   public static final IniSerializer DEFAULT_READABLE = new IniSerializer(create().ws());
221
222   /**
223    * Creates a new builder.
224    *
225    * @return A new builder.
226    */
227   public static Builder create() {
228      return new Builder();
229   }
230
231   /** Key-value separator. */
232   protected final char kvSeparator;
233
234   /** Whether to add spaces around the separator. */
235   protected final boolean spacedSeparator;
236
237   /** Whether to emit property descriptions as comments. */
238   protected final boolean useComments;
239
240   /**
241    * Constructor.
242    *
243    * @param builder The builder.
244    */
245   public IniSerializer(Builder builder) {
246      super(builder);
247      kvSeparator = builder.kvSeparator;
248      spacedSeparator = builder.spacedSeparator;
249      useComments = builder.useComments;
250   }
251
252   @Override
253   public IniSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
254      return IniSerializerSession.create(this);
255   }
256
257   @Override
258   public Builder copy() {
259      return new Builder(this);
260   }
261
262   @Override
263   public IniBeanPropertyMeta getIniBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
264      if (bpm == null)
265         return IniBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
266      return iniBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new IniBeanPropertyMeta(k, this));
267   }
268
269   @Override
270   public IniClassMeta getIniClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
271      return iniClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new IniClassMeta(k, this));
272   }
273
274   @Override
275   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
276      return super.properties()
277         .a(PROP_kvSeparator, String.valueOf(kvSeparator))
278         .a(PROP_spacedSeparator, spacedSeparator)
279         .a(PROP_useComments, useComments);
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Convenience delegator that opens a {@link RecordWriter} over the output using
284    * <b>default session arguments</b> (mirrors {@link #serialize(Object)}).
285    *
286    * <p>
287    * The real implementation lives on {@link IniSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)}.
288    * Callers that need request-derived configuration should call {@link #createSession()} and
289    * invoke {@link IniSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)} on the built session instead.
290    *
291    * @param output The output.
292    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
293    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
294    */
295   @Override /* RecordWritable */
296   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
297      return ((RecordWritable) getSession()).serializeRecords(output);
298   }
299
300   @Override /* RecordWritable */
301   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
302      return false;
303   }
304}
